title: Song
content:
Oh roses for the flush of youth,
        And laurel for the perfect prime;
    But pluck an ivy branch for me
        Grown old before my time.

    Oh violets for the grave of youth,
        And bay for those dead in their prime;
    Give me the withered leaves I chose
        Before in the old time.
meaning: About: Christina Georgina Rossetti was a British poet, who wrote a variety of romantic, devotional, and children's poems. She is best known for her long poem Goblin Market, her love poem "Remember", and for her Christmas poem "In the Bleak Midwinter".
